name: forgebee
description: Batteries-included development and growth framework for Claude Code — 33 slash commands, 57 specialist agents, 24 lifecycle hooks across 9 events, 3 skills, adversarial debate system (dev + strategy), continuous learning with instinct-based pattern extraction and confidence scoring, evidence-based verification gates, TDD enforcement, intent detection, crash recovery checkpointing, governance audit trail, agent contract validation, Growth OS 9-phase marketing pipeline with CRO and email automation, and automated project management.
